title: Passport Application
content: To apply for a passport in India, visit Passport Seva Portal, register/login, fill application form, upload documents, pay fees, and book appointment. Required documents include Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, and Address Proof.

title: Driving License
content: To apply for a driving license, visit Parivahan portal, fill application form, upload learner license, book driving test slot, and pay fees.

title: PAN Card
content: To apply for PAN card, visit NSDL/UTIITSL portal, fill PAN application form, upload ID proof, address proof, and photograph.
